Package sprites

Class SpaceShip

java.lang.Object
sprites.SpaceShip
All Implemented Interfaces:
Collidable, Sprite
public class SpaceShip extends Object implements Sprite, Collidable
The player's ship. Implements Sprite. It needs methods to move left and right based on keyboard input and a method to fire a shot.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • SpaceShip

      public SpaceShip(double x, double y, double width, double height, double speed)
      Construct a SpaceShip.
      Parameters:
      x - initial x coordinate
      y - initial y coordinate
      width - ship width (for collisions/fallback drawing)
      height - ship height (for collisions/fallback drawing)
      speed - movement speed in pixels per frame

  • Method Details

    • moveLeft

      public void moveLeft()
      Move ship left within screen bounds.

    • moveRight

      public void moveRight(double screenWidth)
      Move ship right within given screen width.
      Parameters:
      screenWidth - the width of the screen

    • shoot

      public Shot shoot()
      Fire a new shot from the ship's top center.
      Returns:
      a new Shot moving upward

    • consumeHit

      public boolean consumeHit()
      Consume the hit flag if set.
      Returns:
      true if a hit was pending, false otherwise
